# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: my-deployment
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: myapp
  replicas: 3
  template:    
    metadata:      
        annotations:            # Add the annotation to skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is not required in your case as all pod templates are already skipped with SideCar Injection disabled by default.
          sidecar-istio.io/inject:"false" 
    spec:    
      containers:      
        - name: myapp             # replace "myapp" to the actual container image you want your Deployment running on   and uncomment below line if required as per case requirements        
          image: registry.example.com/image_name                
--- 
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3           
kind: DestinationRule    # Replace "<YourKind>" to the actual resource kind you want your Istio SideCar injection on          
metadata:  
 name : <DestName> 
 namespace: default       
 spec:    
 host : “*.region.example.com”     
 subsets:      
 - name: external          # replace "external" with an appropriate subset's name for your service
